goal: Bind all six failed T0703 exact-main attempts: the fifth MUTATION_FAILED receipt created one encrypted Processed lineage and coincided with a Gmail Trash aggregate increase whose exact-source attribution remains unclaimed, while the sixth reconciliation attempt stopped at PROCESSED_PLAN with independently verified zero new effect. Execute one repaired zero-new-write reconciliation candidate that restores the historical encrypted Gmail label state before deterministic Processed replay, selects exactly one verified Trash source backed by the sole pre-existing encrypted processed-current pointer, performs Raw and Processed remote recovery plus second verification, and confirms the prior unknown outcome without any Gmail or private-repository write. Do not rerun or redispatch any failed head, and do not enter T0704, Timeline, GA, scheduling, final Acceptance or final publication.
scope: T0703 and S7AC-003 protected unknown-mutation reconciliation Oracle only; do not enter T0704 or a later release phase

bind machine/stages/S7/reviews/t0703/attempt-ledger.json as the exact six-attempt failed lineage, with the first four zero-effect attempts, the fifth closed MUTATION_FAILED aggregate and the sixth PROCESSED_PLAN zero-effect failure
one controlled pull request and merge of one new exact cumulative verified zero-mutation reconciliation candidate to current main solely to finish T0703; this is not final publication
reuse the already verified moomooau-beta Environment with no manual reviewer and main-only deployment branch policy
reuse the exact eight already provisioned Environment Secret values without copying, reading back or disclosing them

reuse the exact protected Beta config, capacity observation, sender registry, Owner-confirmed GitHub App installation and private repository link, age identity, opaque ID key and Gmail OAuth credential
bind repository, owner, actor, main ref, workflow ref, GitHub-hosted runner, run attempt and expected commit before any Secret read
validate the immutable T0702 protected PASS receipt and current same-tree T0703 Run Contract before protected execution

scan only metadata, require exactly one deterministically verified Trash candidate whose opaque source has the sole pre-existing encrypted processed-current pointer, and fetch a full Raw message only after that unique binding

quarantine and count only MessageMetadataUnverifiable per-message outcomes before verification, while retaining hard failure for authentication, authorization, transport, content-boundary or global discovery errors

preserve closed public-safe InstallationTokenFailureClass and aggregate failure class enums, validate every optional scope echo that is present, require an exact bounded repository-scope probe when the repository echo is absent, and validate the one-hour TTL against the bounded server Date without emitting any protected identifier
perform no new private-repository write; recover only the pre-existing age-encrypted Raw and Processed lineage from the single private data repository

when protected classification or parser evidence is absent, produce explicit encrypted SAFE_DEFERRED Processed data without guessing a rule or parser profile, including when attachment extraction is safely quarantined
verify idempotent remote recovery of the existing Raw and Processed ciphertext before a second deterministic sender verification
recover the historical Gmail label state only from the existing age-encrypted Processed document envelope and reject malformed, non-canonical, Sent or Draft label state before replay
require the second exact source metadata to retain the TRASH label and never call users.messages.trash or any other Gmail mutation endpoint
emit aggregate-only public evidence and remove the age identity plaintext from runner tmpfs
run local and CI task, type, package, status, publication, workflow-policy and Stage 7 preflight gates before dispatch
non_goals: GitHub workflow rerun, redispatch of failed f747ddcd, 9b15c4d5, bc0bfb3b, b922219f, c860f388 or 9ca3b47e candidate, or more than one dispatch of the new zero-mutation reconciliation candidate

creating or renaming a private data repository, creating another GitHub App, broadening App permissions or installing it on another repository
inventing a production classification rule or parser profile without protected evidence

thread trash, permanent delete, Sent or Draft mutation

claiming production health, final Acceptance, Stage 7 completion or final publication
performing the final whole-package review or final publication in this run
protected_oracles: the exact T0702 and S7AC-002 protected PASS receipt remains valid and satisfies the M3 predecessor

the exact T0703 attempt ledger validates six attempt-1 failures with no rerun; the first four have zero observed effects, c860f388 has MUTATION_FAILED with one recovered Processed lineage and one Gmail Trash aggregate increase with unclaimed attribution, and 9ca3b47e stopped at PROCESSED_PLAN with zero new effect
the existing moomooau-beta Environment remains reviewer-free and main-only with exactly eight allowlisted Secret names
the Owner-confirmed least-privilege GitHub App installation resolves the same sole private data repository numeric identity at runtime
any GitHub App token or aggregate-gate failure emits only a closed failure class and no protected identifier

content-safe per-message metadata unavailability is quarantined and cannot prevent the next deterministically verifiable candidate from reaching Budget 1
exactly one verified source is simultaneously in Trash and bound by opaque ID to the sole pre-existing processed-current pointer before any full Raw fetch

the pre-existing Raw and Processed ciphertext both recover exactly from the private remote without any new private write

ordering_resolution: The fifth exact-main attempt reached one recovered Processed lineage and then returned the closed MUTATION_FAILED aggregate; independent post-run checks observed the only processed-current transition from ZERO to ONE and Gmail Trash aggregate increase by one, but those aggregates alone do not prove exact-source attribution. The sixth exact-main reconciliation attempt recovered Raw and then stopped at PROCESSED_PLAN with no new remote or Gmail effect because live TRASH label state cannot reproduce the historical pre-Trash snapshot. The repaired candidate recovers that historical state from the encrypted Processed envelope, selects the sole verified Trash source backed by the pointer, then re-verifies and remotely recovers the same source with zero new write. This contract never claims either closed failure's hidden subreason, never reruns or redispatches a failed head, and withholds T0704 and final publication.
rollback: Every gate fails closed. The failed f747ddcd, 9b15c4d5, bc0bfb3b, b922219f, c860f388 and 9ca3b47e attempts are immutable evidence and cannot be rerun or redispatched. The reconciliation path has no Gmail or private-repository write branch: if App installation token minting, repository scope, unique processed-current binding, encrypted historical label recovery, Raw or Processed recovery, second verification, Trash label, capacity, identity or repository binding fails, it exits without mutation. Aggregate failures expose only closed enums.
stop_conditions: the frozen Stage 0 manifest, inherited product contract, protected T0702 PASS receipt or cumulative Stage 6 gate drifts
the workflow can run from a non-main ref, non-GitHub-hosted runner, repeated run attempt, unexpected repository, owner, actor, commit, event or Environment
the reconciliation controlled main delivery, full Raw read, M3 reconciliation run or dispatch budget would exceed one, or any Gmail/private-repository write becomes reachable
any prior failed head is rerun or redispatched, or cumulative protected M3 dispatches would exceed seven after the single reconciliation candidate
the existing Environment is not moomooau-beta, requires manual review, permits a non-main deployment branch or differs from exactly eight Secret names
the private data repository or GitHub App binding differs from the protected Beta config
a protected credential would be committed, logged, exposed to a public response or retained outside approved runner memory or tmpfs
a Secret outside the exact eight allowlisted names can reach the protected runtime
sender identity, trusted Authentication-Results alignment or business fingerprint is ambiguous, guessed or unavailable
capacity evidence is unavailable, stale, future-dated, RED or UNKNOWN
Raw or Processed remote recovery is not one hundred percent
the source message fails the second deterministic verification, no longer carries TRASH, or any Gmail mutation endpoint is reachable
Timeline, Blue-Green, T0704, GA, schedule, production workflow or final-publication authority enters the T0703 path
aggregate output can disclose an exact mailbox count, Gmail field, Secret or private repository identifier
